word: G4320 - προσαναβαίνω - prosanabaínō - pros-an-ab-ah'-ee-no - Go up

sections.paragraph:
- Original: προσαναβαίνω

- Transliteration: Prosanabaino

- Phonetic: pros-an-ab-ah'-ee-no

- Definition:

1. to go up further

2. go up higher

- Origin: from G4314 and G305

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G4314 and G305; to ascend farther that is be promoted (take an upper (more honorable) seat): - go up.
